ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data record */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the market data */,
  "timestamp_utc" TEXT /* Timestamp of the market data in UTC */,
  "open" TEXT /* Open price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "high" TEXT /* High price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "low" TEXT /* Low price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "close" TEXT /* Close price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume of the cryptocurrency traded */,
  "price_change_24h" TEXT /* Price change over the last 24 hours */,
  "volume_change_24h" TEXT /* Volume change over the last 24 hours */,
  "is_live" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data is live or historical */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency (e.g., BTCUPUSDT) */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange the data comes from */,
  "data_feed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data feed the data comes from */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_data_feed_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_feed_id") REFERENCES data_feeds ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency (e.g., Bitcoin) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency (e.g., BTCUPUSDT) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "circulating_supply" TEXT /* Circulating supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "max_supply" TEXT /* Maximum supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the cryptocurrency's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the cryptocurrency's official website */,
  "whitepaper_url" TEXT /* URL of the cryptocurrency's whitepaper */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange (e.g., Binance) */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the exchange */,
  "api_secret" TEXT /* API secret for the exchange */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the exchange (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the exchange is located */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the exchange's official website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the exchange */,
  "api_rate_limit" INTEGER /* API rate limit for the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_feeds" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data feed */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data feed (e.g., CoinGecko) */,
  "feed_type" TEXT /* Type of data feed (e.g., API, WebSocket) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data feed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data feed (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_sync" TEXT /* Last synchronization timestamp */,
  "sync_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency at which the data feed is synchronized */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data feed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, portfolio manager) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the user accessed the platform */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user (e.g., city, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_type" TEXT /* Type of the dashboard (e.g., market overview, portfolio analysis) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time when the dashboard was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dashboard (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard the visualization belongs to */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of the visualization (e.g., line chart, bar chart) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time when the visualization was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the visualization (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
